name: French Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl; stir until well blended.
2. Place the mixture in a foil packet or 1-pint glass jar and label as French Dressing Mix.
3. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
4. Makes enough mix (5 tablespoons) for 1 1/4 cups of French Dressing.
VARIATION:
Sweet Italian Dressing: Increase sugar to 1/2 cup. Substitute 1 teaspoon celery seed for paprika.
French Dressing: Combine 1 packet of the mix, 3/4 cup vegetable oil, and 1/4 cup vinegar in a glass jar. Shake until well blended. Chill before serving.
Makes about 1 1/4 cups of French Dressing.
